Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not visually represented; instead, it shows PlantUML code with syntax errors. This makes it unclear and inaccessible to non-technical stakeholders who cannot interpret code.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is incomplete as it does not visually depict any components, connections, or layout as seen in the ground truth. It lacks the necessary elements to convey the architecture.

Consistency.justification: There is no visual consistency with the ground truth diagram. The generated output is purely textual and does not use any symbols, icons, or layout styles present in the ground truth.
